profile.work_background:
Visionary leader and social entrepreneur with over 25 years of experience spanning banking, corporate finance, real estate development, and social innovation. Co-founder of Joint Idea, Life Works Labs, and Love Mafia, dedicated to cultivating ecosystems of higher consciousness through community, collaboration, and compassionate leadership. Currently contributing to family business Nurol Holding as facilitator and advisor, focusing on family governance and corporate sustainability initiatives alongside her sister.
Core philosophy centers on constructive approaches and belief in humanity, with expertise in creating collaborative environments that transcend traditional business models. Ardent advocate for global awakening and the "Paying it Forward" philosophy.  Servotel | Real Estate Project Development Consultant (2010 - 2016)
Participated in numerous innovative projects domestically and internationally in real estate project development consulting.
Nurol Holding | Corporate Finance (Early Career - 2008)
Corporate finance focused role within family conglomerate company founded in 1966, operating in construction, defense, finance, energy, mining, tourism, and real estate sectors.
DışBank | Corporate Banking (Career Start)
Began professional career in Corporate Banking at DışBank Güneşli branch.

profile.purpose_projects:
As speaker, writer, and facilitator, mission is to inspire and empower individuals and communities to realize their potential, embrace their authenticity, and contribute to a more compassionate and inclusive world. Clear message: By understanding and applying principles of universal laws, we can all play a part in creating a ripple effect of positive change, paying it forward for generations to come.
Operating with "constructive" approach and "belief in humanity" as guiding compass, particularly honoring love as compass in the land of Sufism and Rumi.

work.raw:
I never thought that I am dominant in nature. Contemplating on my shadow in dominance made me realize how  sneaky our shadows are hidden in the out open. My dominance all through my childhood has been manifested as timidity. And now I realize thats why I have ran away from my family company, not to bow head to the authority and find my own voice and purpose in life. And in my social entrepreneurial ego I became pompous and pushed my sister and my family away. Seeking what actually my 45th gene key is seeking; a utopian dream. Yes, as a line 1 I have been an investigator, trying to understand life, its mechanics and myself and my  purpose. And the journey has been from insecurity to self empowerment.  

And nexus - when I read these words "becoming the gathering point for multiple beings to manifest greatness in the form of loving service" I have always been a gathering point and blew life into a group of people and made them feel a sense of belonging, turn that togetherness into a community. A dear friend gave me a feedback the other day, said "Eda, what I admire most about you is that you do not discriminate anyone, understand everyone" may be that has been my curse and my gift. I could not fit into hierarchies or high society - couldn't understand the cast system discriminating one from the other. and my gift - as this lead to creating synergies in between people and communities and see wonderful ways they can collaborate and contribute to a common goodness.
work.theme: I gather people into synergy and translate between worlds so we can build meaning together toward a shared dream of what's possible.
work.summary: Eda brings people together across difference, weaving synergies between perspectives that others might see as separate or opposed. For over a decade, she has been a gathering point — hosting, listening, and helping communities discover shared purpose and belonging. Her work is rooted in the belief that everyone holds truth within their own story, and that real communion happens when we create space for those truths to meet.

insights.title: Nexus
insights.body: Eda creates gathering points where people discover their interconnection and belonging. She translates perspectives across divides, helping others see through each other's eyes without judgment or hierarchy. Her work lives in the synergy between people — the alchemy that happens when different worlds meet through sincere human encounter.

work.web_intro: I bring people together across difference — not by erasing what makes us distinct, but by creating the conditions where those differences become generative. For over a decade, I have been a gathering point. I host, I listen, I translate between worlds that others see as separate or opposed. My work lives in the space between people — the alchemy that happens when perspectives meet through sincere human encounter and discover they belong to the same conversation.
highlights: I create synergies between people and communities who might not otherwise find each other
I translate perspectives across divides without flattening what makes each one true
I help groups discover shared purpose without forcing agreement or erasing tension
I hold space where people can see through each other's eyes and feel genuinely seen in return
work.web_closing: What I do is turn togetherness into community, and community into a field where something larger can move through us.

qa_answers.0: co-founder is my title I guess. it actually means that I co-create and find meaning  with like hearted people. And we have regarded ourselves as Utopian-ist for the longest time. and when I am at my best I inspire people and communities to create for a better future.
qa_answers.1: creating synergies and meaning in between people. I believe everyone is right through their perspective and their stories. I find myself showing / transferring the others perspective to the other most of the time . helping them comprehend the other within their story and experiences.
qa_answers.2: I would still want to host and bring people together I suppose. I love meeting people who entered our lives through the magic of a true sincere human algorithm . I would still want to serve the other. Listen and guide. share what evokes within me. And believe me, no-one is paying me for what I do. And I still do it. for 10 years now.
qa_answers.3: Oh my, when I tap into the victim mind, the lack state of mind - I do tend to dominate. Lately I realize ı dominate conversations and decisions as well but mostly with humor and for the collective good. (or I choose to believe, who knows)  But in the shadow side  I do  go along  not to deeply disturb the patriarchy and the demands that comes with it out of respect (which possibly is the biggest lie I tell myself)  and hide my deepest  truth from them most of the time and that limits the time that I spend with my immediate family (not siblings but my  parents) and my gift of creating synergy in their lives manifests in a limited way. however  in what I do in life this shadow manifests as insecurity and deep need to investigate  to feel safe to say yes . And I believe we have missed many amazing opportunities as a result of my self doubt and the fear of the unknown.
qa_answers.4: I hope conscious choice most of the time. I can not deny that I find myself in mechanical habit time to time, playing games on my phone and wasting my time with truly meaningful things that calm my mind though. but mostly decision making, responding to life is from a conscious choice, from a pause and silence to give space to intuition to rise.

lens.raw: I have learned that one word that I would have never associated with myself  - pride - has many layers. I guess thats one of the reasons I love gene keys, we get to deep dive into the words and its layers. I have always been aware of my willpower and yes, born into a patriarchal Black Sea family I have learned and mastered manipulation - just to be able to navigate in the world. And as my words has somewhat always chosen to come from a higher plane for the longest time, I might have put people to shame and guilt and manipulated to clear my path. And its after art of living that I experienced fully the power of a service state of mind and surrendered my will power to the greater good. The love of selling something has always been within me, but then with time and age and may be wisdom- my love shifted into selling the truth, the tools that came my way that revealed the glimpses of truth within me - in the service of a higher purpose to deliver a message in the world. That's why "heart marketing" gift of 26th gene key resonates deeply with me.
lens.theme: Trusting life's flow enough to let my voice emerge — not through control or comprehensive knowledge, but through artful presence in service of truth.
lens.summary: Eda has learned to transform her strategic mind from a tool of self-protection into an instrument of service. Where she once used her understanding of human nature to control outcomes and avoid conflict, she now channels that artfulness into delivering truth with relaxed confidence. Her evolution is a journey from hidden manipulation to visible leadership — trusting life's flow while skillfully drawing attention to what wants to emerge through her.
lens.web_heading: From Hidden Strategy to Visible Service
lens.web_intro: I grew up learning how to navigate. Black Sea family, patriarchal structure — I became fluent in reading rooms, anticipating moves, clearing my own path through artful persuasion. For years I thought this was just survival. Then I discovered it was something else: a capacity to see what motivates people, what shapes their choices, what makes them say yes or no. I used it well. I also used it to stay safe, to avoid being seen too clearly myself.
highlights: Gene Keys taught me that pride has layers — that my willpower was not the problem, but what I was willing it toward
Art of Living cracked something open: the power of a service state, surrendering control to something greater
I have always loved selling — but now I sell truth, the tools that revealed glimpses of it in me
My words used to come from a higher plane in a way that put people into shame or guilt without my realising it
Now I trust the flow enough to let my voice emerge — not through knowing everything, but through relaxed presence
lens.web_closing: Heart marketing resonates because it names what I already do: strategy in service of something real.

qa_answers.0: my life has been a battle after an other - trying to survive and be heard and be seen. An unconscious fear inside of me, tickling me from time to time and my deepest desire has been to catch the moments of total bliss, flow, harmony - a place without resistance. its for the last few years that I have realized my shadow of manipulation. Though I chose to think that I was doing it to create peace and harmony, I actually was using it trying to eliminate possible chaos and conflict that may or may not rise in the future. Though I had a blog called believer in life, I now realize I was not trusting life but constantly control life, actions of others, trying to make things softer for everyone and even may be shielding the truth. yes, I know, I was able to handle this because I was gifted with the gift to understand everyone within their realities, not judge but accept them. And hence I was able to explain the situation to an other with a broader perspective - not through my judgments but through my understandings. Life has been constantly trying to teach me to trust its flow - may that be beautiful and easeful times and also confrontational and hard times. There is not good or bad. they are all a part of an experiential spectrum. And that wonderfully resonates with my sage "Easy is right" once I let go off that resistance in me and the desire to control the outcome  now I realize and confirm that my life has been a progression from difficult to easy, from complex to simple, from hidden to obvious.
qa_answers.1: My greatest challenge has been and possibly still is to be seen and appreciated and accepted for who I am - self remembering and creating a source from within - not from outside is the higher potential that has been hidden. Relaxed confidence  - I am still letting this blossom within me. Whenever I want to the stage to talk there has been this inner voice judging me - what do claim to know and knowledgeable enough to talk about it. this need to know comprehensively so that I could voice my reality, my belief has been the hurdle in my life. and in spite of that - I chose and choose to be on stage and give voice to that wants to come into life through me. now I realize that I have a gift of skillfully drawing the attention of others to deliver a message and that was the potential that was hidden  in me. My artfulness to use manipulation for a higher purpose. And that I am realizing day by day for the last 10 years with each courages decision that I make to take the stage.
qa_answers.2: that I should be humble, not in the spotlights and hide in this life - that being humble is a virtue.
qa_answers.3: that we should not take this game so seriously that we loose ourselves within it. We are all going to die. Instead of focusing on what others think - if we are realizing our potential - if that, if this - we should be living, listening to our gut feeling, inner compass and enjoy being us.
qa_answers.4: I do not see them as challenges or at some cases failures, I see them as experiences and lessons. Easy does it.

field.raw:
Dishonor - accountability for your own state. We dishonor ourselves every time  we don't accept the way we feel / behave. We blame anything for anything. Being accountable for our self judgments. Shadow can leave the other feeling dishonored and distributed. Shadow do not acknowledge their accountability for what they say or do. 

Gift see that all is interconnected. 
Your whole life is geared towards impacting peoples emotions in a positive way. Not just about stirring their feelings, but also touching their hearts and souls. Act with grace and consideration in everything you do. Gift can help others become free of their negatively charged emotions. Elevate others to a state of love, laughter and tears. People feel deeply understood and listened to around this gift. 

Your work will be in relationships and emotions. Now allow yourself to become a victim of someone else's emotions. Delicate balance between self love and service. Others will look to you for guidance and authority. When you no longer judge yourself, you no longer judge others. 

balancing act - learn to be careful without being fearful, learn to be warm without being overbearing, learn to be candid without being cruel. 

Naturally slow down inside yourself and daily life - more contemplative individual. Healthy habits become your breakthrough. Catalyze synchronicity. 

Graciousness is an attitude of deep reverence  and gratitude for life, empowering one to live fully yet with deep respect and consideration for others feelings in every moment. 

line 3 - diverse interactions with people, places and experiences. pollinating the world around you with your natural joy and enthusiastic connection  with others. your radiance comes alive inside the exchange of information and stories with others. Challenge is not hiding from your emotions / emotional drama. Be truly honest and authentic. 

Breakthrough may come as you let go off the idea of having goals and expectations and simply swimming through the many phases of life.Find themselves helping less fortunate. 

fires of grace - listening and learning from the creative currents of sexual energy.

qa_answers.0: I live and work in the same premises. we used to have an office which gave us tremendous joy. But since the pandemic - home. I am decluttering our home all the time. 50 years of accumulation needs to be filtered and slowing moving into a simpler, cleaner, neater inside and out. However our summer house represents my inner world much efficiently. A big kitchen to create, to dream to share with lots of light. And in the winter house recently I have moved the study table looking to our garden and receiving more light which makes me happier. I am highly organized inside and out I suppose and hence I love going through the drawers and sorting / cleaning and throwing this out seasonally.
qa_answers.1: I have always thrived in being events or vacations like club med. being a part of a selected  tribe and being a bee pollinating, chatting, vibrating, bringing my wisdom / joy to the individuals all around has been where I felt most alive. Recently, since 50, though I fought with the idea - I have slowed down. stopped trying to prove myself. I truly have no goals. That frustrated me in the being but the more I surrendered to it, the more I am at ease with what life throws my way. I am in fully service mode - if something  / someone crosses my path my inner motivation is - how may I be of service.
qa_answers.2: I am at most ease when I am listened and when my words a truly respected and appreciated. I am lucky that I do not need to impose myself on anyone or any subject any more - I am me and divert my energy, my love, my attention, my ecosystems and my capabilities once I am called to action and once my inner voice says engage.
qa_answers.3: It used to be. I am not gonna lie. I needed to be seen as I am, when I did nıt need to act or diminish myself or hide myself. - where I can unapologetically me. And today - more and more I am me where ever I am. And if I can not be, I know those are not my people and that is not my environment and I withdraw myself politely.
qa_answers.4: My body did tell me to slow down - and I have been trusting it and following its call. Though my mind has always been inclined to speak its truth - I am catching myself once spoken untimely the pitch of my voice increases, I cant use my breath with ease and  the effect that I would like to make gets lost in  the moment, fades away.

call.raw:
Our challenges makes us stronger. - humbler and more human. The way we handle the challenges determines breakthrough / breakdown / breakup. Responding to life rather than reacting. 

Your purpose is to bring light into places where there is no light. Must not get stuck with any single way of being. Everything about you is changing all the time.  Don't define yourself with the past. Aligned purpose changes you - purpose becomes constant not you. Each transformation leads you to a new cycle.  Life is not about success of failure - it's about turning lead into gold. 

Shadow is an access portal  through which deep fears of humanity flows into our waking consciousness. and become burdens in our lives.  Living in denial and rejection to these unconscious  fear patterns - evil is nothing but our fear manifested in the world. The most thing that terrifies you is your route to higher evolution. Your denial of your shadow is not only dishonoring yourself but also life itself.  you listen to someone through your own agenda, and hear what you want to hear. Your suffering is a magic mirror. Oppression is the collection of ones deepest fears and avoidance patterns . 

Surpass yourself. Quantum leap into new dimensions - huge turning points. Continuous surrender to fears. - turn challenges into artistic opportunities for grace. 

Line 3 - movement. your core stability comes through movement and energy rather than stillness. Needs regular physical exercise. purpose comes alive when you move through many changing scenes of your destiny, encounter to encounter.

qa_answers.0: utopia - a world where majority of human beings are courages enough to work on their shadows and embrace their true being and create a better collective reality that is just and loving and compassionate. every day with every word with every breath this is my intention.
qa_answers.1: the fear creeps up, very very rarely lately, but still there are times that it creeps up ... sometimes it makes me wake up in  the middle of the night sweating, or sometimes in my relationships when I fall into oppression and victim mode... there is a deep spiral of darkness that wants to lure you into the chaos is carries. One breath, one deep silent moment that I draw to bring myself back to reality - to pull myself into the observer mode, to witness the human experiencing I am going through within the story of Eda. I catch myself in the story, engaged... and yet watch myself becoming aware of the observer - yet still me. Life is I believe going to be the experiential journey of the self - mostly in the observer state if possible.
qa_answers.2: nexus - a point  that extends to multiple networks co-creating and bound with a red thread.  Surrender wants to manifest through me. Without clinging into any form or title creation wants to come through me.
qa_answers.3: true honesty - pure vulnerability and authenticity. zero masks. full surrender. Transfiguration.
qa_answers.4: the pure fear of loosing loved ones, disturbing a system, hacking multiple realities .... it would feel like bliss if all those involved listen and converse with each other from purely love frequency and understanding. Course In Miracles.
